title: Teleconference: Scientific Advisory Committee on Respiratory and Allergy Therapies (SAC-RAT) – October 26, 2012 - Canada.ca
content:
## Teleconference: Scientific Advisory Committee on Respiratory and Allergy Therapies (SAC-RAT) – October 26, 2012
- Date and Time: Friday, October 26, 2012, 1:00pm - 3:30pm
- Chairperson: Irvin Mayers
- Science Advisor: Bob Li
- Science and Regulatory Officers: Erica Harnett, Caroline Hunt
- Participants: SAC-RAT Members, Scientific Advisory Committee for Pharmaceutical Sciences and Clinical Pharmacology (SAC-PSCP) Members, Health Canada
